source_pr.title: executor: fix failpoint race for analyze test
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16369

Problem Summary: failpoint cause data race in analyze test. which makes other tests failed.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: make the failpoint test unparalleled.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- fix failpoint race for analyze test

fix_pattern: executor: fix failpoint race for analyze test

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix failpoint race for analyze test.
evidence: diff moves TestFailedAnalyzeRequest to a different suite (testSuite9) to avoid failpoint/test interference (executor/analyze_test.go).
